title: Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug, Stainless Steel, Rechargeable, Self Stirring (pink)
description:
About this item
Automatic Stirring: This mug features an automatic magnetic stirring mechanism to keep your beverage perfectly blended.
Rechargeable Battery: Equipped with a rechargeable lithium battery for cordless operation and easy portability.
Stainless Steel Construction: Made from durable stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting use and easy cleaning.
Versatile Design: Suitable for hot and cold beverages, making it ideal for coffee, tea, protein shakes, and more.
Capacity: Holds up to 12 oz (355 ml) of your favorite beverage.
